title: Repealed
doc_html:
§1730.22.1. Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 836, §5, effective Jan. 1, 2016.

            Acts 2014, No. 836, §2, eff. June 23, 2014; Acts 2014, No. 836, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2016.
